events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Since the photo set only shows work completed *after* the hold point — with the prerequisite verification step (wiring/circuit continuity checks) and its signoff page absent — the sequence compliance can't be confirmed either way, so I flagged this as `needs_more_info` (medium risk) rather than an outright pass or fail, with actions to obtain the missing signoff or perform field verification before further progress.
